rows.protocol_note: GPT-5.6 Preview System Card dated 2026-06-25. Comparison values use recent model snapshots and may differ from launch values. The card often reports performance across reasoning-effort curves; only explicit table cells or exact prose values are normalized here. 60 in-house multiple-choice questions across five biothreat stages; adjusted score treats refusals/safe completions as successes.
